features.secureConnDesc: We connect your account in read-only mode. We only see amounts and labels, without ever being able to initiate transfers.
features.targetedAnalysisDesc: Our system searches only for strict matches between Tenant Name, Rent Amount, and Date.

trust.description:
Coridor uses Powens technology, a payment institution authorized by ACPR (Banque de France) under number 16928.
Your banking credentials are encrypted and never stored by Coridor.

review.title: Tenant Evaluation
review.subtitle: Evaluate your tenant on factual and objective criteria.
review.instructions: This factual evaluation will help your tenant build their trust profile for future rental searches.

PAYMENT_REGULARITY.label: Payment regularity
PAYMENT_REGULARITY.question: Was the rent paid every month during the lease?
PAYMENT_REGULARITY.POSITIVE: Yes, the rent was paid every month, even if there were a few minor delays
PAYMENT_REGULARITY.NEUTRAL: Generally yes, but with frequent delays requiring regular reminders
PAYMENT_REGULARITY.NEGATIVE: No, there were significant unpaid amounts or months left unpaid

PROPERTY_CONDITION.label: Property condition
PROPERTY_CONDITION.question: Did the property suffer intentional or negligent damage?
PROPERTY_CONDITION.POSITIVE: No, the property was returned in good condition considering the length of stay — normal wear and tear, minor everyday incidents
PROPERTY_CONDITION.NEUTRAL: Some damage beyond normal wear and tear, settled through the security deposit
PROPERTY_CONDITION.NEGATIVE: Intentional damage or significant negligence requiring major repairs

COMMUNICATION.label: Communication
COMMUNICATION.question: How was the communication with your tenant during the lease?
COMMUNICATION.POSITIVE: Smooth — the tenant was reachable and responsive when needed
COMMUNICATION.NEUTRAL: Acceptable — basic but functional communication, sometimes a bit slow to respond
COMMUNICATION.NEGATIVE: Difficult — frequent non-responses, impossible to reach when needed

WOULD_RECOMMEND.label: Recommendation
WOULD_RECOMMEND.question: Would you recommend this tenant to another landlord?

welcome.title:
Charges
Regularization
welcome.description: Compare actual charges with your tenant's provisions.
welcome.guideSubtitle: Follow the guide, we'll explain everything in 30 sec.

slide1.title:
Charges
regularization
slide1.body1: When signing the lease, you set an estimated monthly charge: these are the provisions.
slide1.body2: At the end of the year, you compare this estimate with the actual cost.

slide2.title:
Two possible
outcomes
slide2.overspendBody: Your tenant owes you a supplement.

slide3.title:
Once a year,
at the start
slide3.body1: You regularize the past year when you have received all invoices.

slide4.title:
Your expenses
must be up to date
slide4.body: Throughout the year, record each charge expense in Coridor: water, electricity, cleaning, maintenance...

slide5.title:
Coridor takes care
of the rest
slide5.body1: We automatically compare your actual charges with the provisions.
slide5.body2: We generate a statement to send to your tenant.

cancelled.emailRebook: If you still wish to visit this property, you can book a new time slot.
cancelled.landlordNotifMessage: The visit of {name} on {date} at {time} was automatically cancelled (not confirmed within 24h).
cancelled.landlordPushBody: The visit of {name} on {date} was not confirmed and has been cancelled.

reminder.notifMessage: Reminder: confirm your visit on {date} at {time} before it is automatically cancelled.
reminder.pushBody: Only 12 hours left to confirm your visit on {date} at {time}
reminder.emailBody: Hello {name}, you have booked a visit for {date} at {time}. You have 12 hours left to confirm your attendance, otherwise the visit will be automatically cancelled.

gift.notifMessage: A {plan} subscription for {duration} has been gifted to you. {reason}

expiring.notifMessage: Your {plan} subscription expires in 7 days. Renew to keep your features.
expiring.emailRenew: Renew now to keep enjoying all your features:

expiringTomorrow.notifMessage: Your {plan} subscription expires tomorrow! Renew now.
expiringTomorrow.emailWarning: Don't lose access to your features:

signLink.notifMessage: The landlord has signed the inspection report for {property}. It is now your turn to sign.
signLink.emailSubject: Inspection report — Sign your inspection report
signLink.emailBody: The landlord has signed the inspection report for {property}. It is now your turn to sign it.
signLink.emailDeadline: You have 24 hours to sign from your phone.
signLink.emailExpiry: This link expires in 24 hours. If you cannot sign now, ask the landlord to resend the link.

pdfEmail.subject: Inspection report — Signed PDF
pdfEmail.heading: Signed inspection report
pdfEmail.body: Here is the PDF of your signed inspection report.
pdfEmail.legalNote: Reminder: the tenant has 10 days after receiving the keys to report any hidden defect (art. 3-2 of the law of July 6, 1989).

pdfReady.notifMessage: The inspection report PDF is ready. You can view and download it.
pdfReady.pushBody: The inspection report PDF is now available.
pdfReady.emailBody: The inspection report has been signed by both parties. The PDF is available by clicking the button below.
pdfReady.emailLegalNote: Reminder: the tenant has 10 days after receiving the keys to report any hidden defect (art. 3-2 of the law of July 6, 1989).

resolution.notifMessage: The 14-day deadline has expired. The deposit is returned according to the partial agreement.
resolution.pushBody: The dispute deadline has expired. The deposit is returned according to the partial agreement.

retentionsProposed.emailBody: The landlord has proposed deductions on your security deposit. View the details and respond from your Coridor account.

overdue.landlordNotifMessage: The legal deadline for returning the deposit for {property} has passed. Penalty: {penalty}€.
overdue.landlordEmailBody: The legal deadline for returning the security deposit for {property} has passed. A penalty of {penalty}€ applies (10% of monthly rent per month of delay, article 22 of the law of July 6, 1989). Return the deposit to avoid further penalties.
overdue.tenantNotifMessage: The return deadline for your deposit for {property} has passed. Applicable penalty: {penalty}€.
overdue.tenantPushBody: Your deposit has not been returned on time.
overdue.tenantEmailHeading: Your deposit has not been returned
overdue.tenantEmailBody: The legal deadline for returning your security deposit for {property} has passed. A penalty of {penalty}€ applies in your favor. You can check your account to learn about your options.

preDeadline.landlordNotifMessage: The legal deadline for returning the security deposit expires in 7 days. Remember to return the deposit to the tenant.
preDeadline.landlordPushBody: The return deadline expires in 7 days.
preDeadline.landlordEmailBody: The legal deadline for returning the security deposit expires in 7 days. Remember to return the deposit to the tenant to avoid penalties provided by law.
preDeadline.tenantNotifMessage: The landlord must return your security deposit within 7 days.
preDeadline.tenantPushBody: Your deposit must be returned within 7 days.
preDeadline.tenantEmailBody: The landlord must return your security deposit within 7 days. You can track the progress from your account.

postDeadline.eventDescription: Second reminder — D+15 after legal deadline expiry
postDeadline.landlordNotifMessage: The legal return deadline has been exceeded by 15 days. A penalty of {penalty}€ applies. Return the deposit to avoid further penalties.
postDeadline.landlordEmailBody: The legal deadline for returning the security deposit has been exceeded by 15 days. A penalty of {penalty}€ applies. Return the deposit to limit penalties.
postDeadline.tenantNotifTitle: Deposit not returned — You can take action
postDeadline.tenantNotifMessage: Your deposit has not been returned on time. You can generate a formal notice from your account.
postDeadline.tenantPushBody: You can generate a formal notice.
postDeadline.tenantEmailSubject: Security deposit — You can take action
postDeadline.tenantEmailHeading: Your deposit has still not been returned
postDeadline.tenantEmailBody: Your security deposit has not been returned within the legal deadlines. You can generate a formal notice from your Coridor account to assert your rights.

footer.disclaimer: You are receiving this email because you are registered on Coridor.

reminder.urgentMessage: Deadline in less than a month! {description}

dpe.title: EPC — Energy Performance Certificate to renew
dpe.description: The EPC of your property is expiring. A new diagnostic must be completed before you can re-let.

electricity.title: Electrical diagnostic to renew
electricity.description: The electrical diagnostic is expiring. Mandatory for any rental if installation is over 15 years old.

gas.title: Gas diagnostic to renew
gas.description: The gas diagnostic is expiring. Mandatory for any rental with a gas installation over 15 years old.

erp.title: Natural Hazards Report (ERP) to renew
erp.description: The ERP is only valid for 6 months. It must be up to date at the time of lease signing.

rentFreeze.title: Rent freeze — EPC {dpe}
rentFreeze.descriptionG: Your property is rated EPC G. It has been prohibited to rent since January 1, 2025. You must carry out energy renovation works.
rentFreeze.descriptionF: Your property is rated EPC F. It will be prohibited to rent from January 1, 2028. Any rent increase (including IRL) has been prohibited since August 2022.

endNotice.title: Landlord termination notice — {type}
endNotice.descriptionFurnished: The furnished lease ends on {date}. The notice period is 3 months. You must send the notice by registered mail or process server.
endNotice.descriptionUnfurnished: The unfurnished lease ends on {date}. The notice period is 6 months. The notice must be justified (sale, personal use, legitimate reason).

rentRevision.title: Annual rent revision (IRL)
rentRevision.description: It is time to revise the rent according to the Rent Reference Index. The revision must be applied within the year following the anniversary date, otherwise it is lost.

chargesRegularization.title: Annual service charges adjustment
chargesRegularization.description: The service charges adjustment must be carried out annually. You must compare the provisions paid by the tenant with the actual charges and make the adjustment.

depositReturn.title: Security deposit return
depositReturn.description: The security deposit must be returned within 2 months after the keys are handed back (1 month if the move-out inspection is compliant). After this deadline, penalties of 10% of the monthly rent per month of delay apply.

tenantInsurance.title: Tenant insurance certificate verification
tenantInsurance.description: The tenant is required to provide a home insurance certificate annually. In case of failure, the landlord may terminate the lease after a formal notice that remains without effect for 1 month.

declaration.title: Property income tax return {year}
declaration.description: Your {year} tax summary is available. Review it to prepare your property income tax return (Form 2044). Online filing deadline: approximately May 20.

receipt.notifMessage: Your rent {docType} for {month} is available for download.
receipt.emailBody: Your rent {docType} for {month} has been generated and is available in your Coridor account.

late.notifMessage: Rent for {month} not detected for {address}. Check your statements.

email.heading: Rent tracking - {month} {year}
email.body: We have not yet detected the rent payment for {month} {year} for your property located at {address}.
email.manualConfirm: If you have already received the payment, you can manually confirm it from your Coridor account.
email.subject: Rent tracking - Reminder {month} {year}

overdue.notifMessage: The rent for {month} is still unpaid for {address}.

critical.notifMessage: The rent for {month} is still unpaid for {address}. We recommend contacting your tenant.

friendlyReminder.messageBody: Hello {name}, we have not yet recorded your rent for {month} (expected amount: {amount} €). If you have already made the payment, please disregard this message. If you are experiencing difficulties, do not hesitate to discuss with your landlord.
friendlyReminder.notifMessage: A reminder about your rent for {month} has been sent to you.

regularization.messageBody:
Hello,

Here is the service charges adjustment statement for the year {year}.

You can view the attached document:
regularization.notifMessage: {landlord} has sent you the service charges adjustment statement for {property}.
regularization.pushBody: {landlord} has sent you the service charges adjustment statement.
regularization.emailBody: {landlord} has sent you the service charges adjustment statement for the year {year} regarding the property {property}.
regularization.emailCta: You can view the document and communicate with your landlord directly on Coridor.
